'''The Dark Side of the Planet''' was an expensive [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], regarded as the most famous nightspot in [[Nuba City]], [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]]. The establishment featured skilled [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancers and exotic offworld cuisine. It was owned by [[Tul Bulba]].<ref name="CatCW" />
